description: Hand-labeled screening ground truth for the pilot CPC vertical (G06N efficient neural inference). Labels are claim-space relevance judgments for the M1 pilot watchlist; KNOWN MISS / KNOWN FALSE POSITIVE notes document the published error budget (DESIGN.md M2).
